done right.

Crispy baguettes, bold fillings, and Vietnamese teas — made fresh every day in West Seattle.

Order Online
Fuel for the hustle

Food made for the people chasing something.

As a convenient, affordable, and flavorful street food, bánh mì has long been the meal of people on the move: early-morning shop owners, students, tradespeople, and professionals chasing their goals.

We carry that spirit forward, fueling the next generation's hustle with food that's quick, satisfying, and crafted with care.

Find Us Online

Follow along, read reviews, or order delivery — we're everywhere you need us.

@gion.banhmi Reviews on Yelp

Made in West Seattle

Giòn means crispy in Vietnamese — and that's exactly what you get. Fresh-baked baguettes, house-pickled veggies, and bold flavors you'll crave every week.
